name: task_update
description: Update one or more fields on an existing structured task. Only the fields provided will be modified; all other fields remain unchanged. Use this for editing task metadata, reassigning agents, or adjusting priority and deadlines without changing the task's lifecycle state.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to update

agent_id.description: ID of the agent assigned to this task

estimated_duration.description: Updated estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours')

metadata.description: Updated metadata object (merged with existing metadata)

parameters.description: Updated scope: Also include integration tests for the new webhook handler
